text.message: oof, I did not see that comeing
gotta take the wood pile blue right?
Purposely blocking anything even a bit good left me little choice
We gotta pick our own stuff lol
we took good spots on purpse how dare we
I would have a hand of millions of sheep or wood with nothing to do but 4 for 1
Im not complaining lol im just saying why i did it
And you've taken all my expansion space
How am I also the rob
All good. I'm counting up the solos needed. Blue first
You place there and rob me first turn
Don't need to work with last place
Lol this ginna be a long game. Touched after 2 seconds already lol
Bro. I have no ore no space and you rob me twice at start...
Do you see why the double rob was unfair yet?
And you're blocking my best spot...
I wouldnt have doubled on 6, 9 10 5 better
Wheat mono from red would be funny
I'm offering 2 brick in my position...
And you rather get 1. So odd
Without getting 3 ore I can't action
Literally only trade worth me doing
I haven't rolled wood all hame
Well definitely helps you more than me
It's an extra brick for you...
For what. Me going to 4 pts
That will be in my hand for nothing
A city with 0 ore is great for you
Well i dont even have ore so
Blue this means you can take road
And if I have a city maybe I have a game
I'm not just going to extend the game for fun...
I'll take road if you want to incentivise me by giving me a game
Do what you want as ai said
If you dont want road dont take it
green saved the game when they extended
Red just finishes it with yop I assume
